summary: Clear audience recording that captures the show’s energy despite missing post‑Shakedown GSET.
review: The reviewer praises this audience capture as beautiful, noting the recorders did an excellent job preserving the concert ambience. Although the GSET after Shakedown is absent, no specific musical performance details are mentioned, so the show's quality cannot be fully assessed beyond the positive impression of the recording itself.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 4‑star review highlights a good‑quality audience capture, leading to a solid rating; limited detail on musical performance keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience recording is described as beautiful and well captured, indicating clear, balanced sound with no reported dropouts or major noise issues.
